name: Splitting.js — Char/Word Text Reveal
description: Splits text into span elements per character/word, assigns CSS custom properties so each piece can be independently animated with pure CSS.
head:
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/splitting/dist/splitting.css" />
<style>
  [data-splitting] { overflow: hidden; }
  .splitting .char { display: inline-block; animation: none; }
  .splitting.reveal-chars .char {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(60%) rotate(4deg);
    animation: split-reveal 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1) forwards;
    animation-delay: calc(var(--char-index) * 0.04s + 0.1s);
  }
  @keyframes split-reveal { to { opacity: 1; transform: none; } }
</style>
body:
<script src="https://unpkg.com/splitting/dist/splitting.min.js"></script>
<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    Splitting();
    var observer = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
      entries.forEach(function(e) {
        if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('reveal-chars'); observer.unobserve(e.target); }
      });
    }, { threshold: 0.2 });
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-splitting]').forEach(function(el) { observer.observe(el); });
  });
</script>
